title: Yearn - REKT
relevance_summary: Flash loan followed by repeated deposits and withdrawals on Curve liquidity pool

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls Curve liquidity pool functions after a flash loan in the same tx

red_flags: Repeated deposits and withdrawals on Curve liquidity pool
summary: The Yearn DAI v1 vault was attacked using 9 flash loans, resulting in $11 million loss. The attacker exploited the fact that the withdrawal fee had been turned off for vault migration.
